# RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.openURL(_:)

**Case**

URL action.

## Declaration

```swift
case openURL(RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction)
```

## Handling URL and phone-dialing actions

- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction**: Suggested action to open a URL.
- **RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.dialPhoneNumber(_:)**: Dialer phone number.
- **RCSService.Business.DialPhoneNumberAction**: Suggested action to dial a phone number.
